name: Rivero School Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: Likely Miami-Dade County Public Schools (M-DCPS) private bus operator serving residential routes; not visible on the published M-DCPS approved private bus companies list reviewed.
recent_news: No M&A, growth, or safety news found in public sources as of 2026.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-vehicle operator (~$152k rev, 2 employees) in Miami; too small for a Summit tuck-in on its own but could be part of a roll-up of Miami-Dade micro-operators. Low priority absent route concentration.
